# ProfileCardActionSpec.IconPng property

Raw PNG bytes for the button icon (same Unity-free convention as [`IconPng`](../MenuButtonSpec/IconPng.md)); the framework rasterises it to a texture. Null renders a label-only button.

```csharp
public byte[]? IconPng { get; set; }
```
